name: cc-remote-control
description: Text yourself 'Claude <projectname>' and your Mac (iMessage) or Linux box (Signal) opens a new local Claude Code session in that project with /remote-control on, ready to drive from the Claude mobile app. No chat.db reading.

plugins.name: cc-remote-control
plugins.description: Spin up Claude Code Remote Control sessions on your Mac (via iMessage Shortcuts) or Linux box (via signal-cli). Ships router scripts plus an interactive setup wizard.
